text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices suggest a cautious mood, potentially weighing on growth stocks. However, specific positive news for AMD and Microsoft offers some counter-narrative for tech and chips.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern with a -36.72% loss and "SELL" status on a leveraged product. SPAL, a new leveraged position, is also down significantly (-48.57%) and needs immediate attention. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and their impact on broader market sentiment. Also, watch your stops on leveraged positions, especially SOXL and SPAL.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage risk on your leveraged, underperforming positions while selectively looking for high-conviction opportunities.
plays: SOXL: Your -36.72% loss on this leveraged ETF is significant. Consider cutting losses or trimming; your default stop at 200 is far from the current 161.05. Adjust it much tighter or exit.
SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is down -48.57%. Re-evaluate your stop at 21.38 (current 12.94) or consider exiting to manage risk on this volatile position.
AMD: With positive AI news and a scanner BUY setup, consider a new buy. Entry 542-539.87, stop 533.75.
